protein_name: Induces cartilage and bone formation. May be the osteoinductive factor responsible for the phenomenon of epithelial osteogenesis. Plays a role in calcium regulation and bone homeostasis. Belongs to the TGF-beta family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: BMP signaling pathway; cartilage development; cell differentiation; developmental process; negative regulation of cell differentiation; ossification; skeletal system development
